top_signals.title: Europe’s Stocks Are Back in the Lead as Stagflation Risks Ease
top_signals.summary: The prospect of peace in the Middle East is setting up European stocks for a standout second half, as investors bet on stronger economic growth and easing inflation.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Philippine SEC signals readiness for RWA tokenization
top_signals.summary: Philippine SEC Commissioner Rogelio Quevedo told Cointelegraph that tokenized assets could give Filipinos more legitimate investment options while helping steer them away from scams.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Inflation expectations impacting rate path, bonds and global risk assets.

top_signals.title: Japan seafood processor aims to hook customers abroad with 'shirasu'
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Amazon AI exec predicts first 'commercially useful' quantum computers in 5-7 years
top_signals.summary: Quantum computing is becoming an increasingly competitive field, with tech giants including Microsoft, Google and IBM developing the technology.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.
